REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF OG TREE, INC. MOTION / NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO 473(B) IS OFF CALENDAR. INSUFFICIENT NOTICE PER CCP 1005 AND CCP 1003. AMENDED MOTION SIGNED ON JANUARY 10, 2022, 5 DAYS AFTER THE EX-PARTE APPLICATION TO CONTINUE THE HEARING TO FEBRUARY 3, 2023 WAS GRANTED TO ALLOW PROPER FILING AND SERVICE (SEE YELLIN DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JANUARY 5, 2023 EX-PARTE APPLICATION, PARAGRAPHS 6 AND 9). ACCORDING TO THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE THE AMENDED MOTION WAS SERVED BY MAIL ON JANUARY 11, 2023 AND THE AMENDMENT MOTION WAS FILED 7 DAYS LATER ON JANUARY 18, 2023. THERE ARE ONLY 16 COURTS DAYS BETWEEN JANUARY 11, 2023 AND FEBRUARY 3, 2023; AND ONLY 12 COURT DAYS BETWEEN JANUARY 18, 2023 AND FEBRUARY 3, 2023. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Relief From Dismissal Pursuant To 473(B); Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Feb-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF OG TREE, INC. MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Relief From Dismissal Pursuant To 473(B) is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1003. Amended Motion signed on January 10, 2022, 5 days after the ex-parte application to continue the hearing to February 3, 2023 was granted to allow proper filing and service (See Yellin Declaration in support of January 5, 2023 ex-parte application, paragraphs 6 and 9). According to the proof of service on file the amended motion was served by mail on January 11, 2023 and the amendment motion was filed 7 days later on January 18, 2023. There are only 16 courts days between January 11, 2023 and February 3, 2023; and only 12 court days between January 18, 2023 and February 3, 2023.
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
